name: @hrkit/starter-rn
description: React Native starter source template for @hrkit BLE heart rate monitoring (copy src/ into your own Expo app)

scripts.start:
node -e "console.log('
@hrkit/starter-rn is a SOURCE TEMPLATE, not a runnable app.

Quickest path: pnpm scaffold ../path/to/my-expo-app

Full instructions: ./README.md
')"
